calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-02-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Elizabeth Mangini.

The Court noted that the assets have come from an ancillary estate in Hawaii, questions why the assets were not distributed there, stated that it would have costed less to do it there and noted that preliminary distribution was done without Court order. Ms. Ebey stated that there were no assets other than the condominium in Hawaii, that they had to start here and that they had to wrap it up. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account, etc. is taken under submission. The Court it is not going to approve preliminary distribution.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Continued To Jan-31-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Elizabeth Mangini.

Ms. Ebey stated that a petition for final distribution is with her Client for signature, that her Client had been ill and that her Client is supposed to overnight it to her today. Status on close of estate is continued to January 31, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
